name: Hassan Raza
title: Senior Software Engineer
headline: Designing systems that move money, data, and decisions at scale
summary: Senior software engineer with 8+ years of experience building distributed systems, financial infrastructure, and AI-driven data platforms. My work centers on designing backend systems that process high-volume transactions, power data pipelines, and support real-world financial operations at scale.

about.label: About
about.title: Building Financial Systems at Scale
about.description: I build distributed systems, financial infrastructure, and AI-driven data platforms that operate under real-world constraints and high-volume workloads.
about.headline: Designing systems that handle financial transactions, data pipelines, and AI workloads at scale
about.summary: Senior software engineer with 8+ years of experience building distributed systems, financial infrastructure, and AI-driven data platforms. My work centers on designing backend systems that process high-volume transactions, power data pipelines, and support real-world financial operations at scale.
body: In my current role, I build and scale systems for a nonprofit-focused financial platform supporting ~1000 organizations and over $1B in annual donation volume. This includes payment infrastructure, data ingestion and ETL pipelines, and AI-powered analytics systems designed for secure, multi-tenant environments.

I focus on systems that need to be reliable, scalable, and maintainable over time—whether it's high-throughput payment processing, large-scale data migration, or building guardrails for AI-driven data access. My approach balances system design, performance, and practical product needs in production environments.

contact.title: Let's talk about systems, scale, and impact
contact.description: If you're working on financial infrastructure, data systems, or AI-driven platforms or exploring collaboration, roles, or ideas in this space, feel free to reach out.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.highlight: Built and scaled fintech systems processing $1B+ annually across payments, data pipelines, and AI-driven analytics
details: Designed and implemented backend systems supporting high-volume donation processing across ACH, cards, stock, crypto, and donor-advised funds
Built large-scale data ingestion and migration pipelines for external platforms, handled over 10M+ records with validation and deduplication
Developed AI-driven analytics features enabling natural language queries over multi-tenant financial datasets with strict safety guardrails
Architected event-driven systems using queues and background workers to ensure reliability, retries, and observability
Improved system scalability and maintainability through modular architecture and clear service boundaries

experience.title: Software Engineer - Gen AI
experience.highlight: Improved LLM reliability through structured evaluation, edge-case analysis, and feedback-driven workflows
details: Evaluated AI-generated code and system outputs to identify correctness issues, inconsistencies, and edge cases
Provided structured feedback to improve model performance, reliability, and response quality
Worked on workflows connecting human evaluation with model improvement cycles
Refined prompts and evaluation criteria to reduce ambiguity and improve output consistency
Collaborated in fast-paced environments focused on improving real-world AI system behavior

experience.title: Software Development Engineer II
experience.highlight: Built distributed backend systems supporting a global hiring platform serving 1.5M+ users
details: Developed scalable backend services for Amazon’s hiring platform impacting over 1.5 million hourly workers
Built and maintained core infrastructure using Java, Node.js, and AWS services
Improved system reliability and availability through monitoring, logging, and fault-tolerant design
Contributed to CI/CD pipelines and deployment automation ensuring stable and frequent releases
Collaborated across teams to deliver high-impact features in a large-scale distributed environment

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.highlight: Led development of ERP, marketplace, and SaaS platforms with focus on scalability and system design
details: Designed and developed full-stack applications including ERP systems and marketplace platforms
Built scalable backend services using Java, Spring Boot, and Node.js
Implemented secure authentication and authorization systems
Deployed and managed cloud infrastructure on AWS ensuring high availability
Mentored junior developers and contributed to architectural decisions across projects

experience.title: Web Application Developer
experience.highlight: Developed and maintained web platforms and internal systems with focus on performance and usability
details: Built and maintained company websites using PHP, WordPress, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
Contributed to internal HR platform development using PHP and Laravel
Improved website performance and optimized user experience
Collaborated with cross-functional teams on design, development, and testing
Handled bug fixes, maintenance, and system enhancements

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

projects.title: Building Financial Infrastructure for Modern Nonprofits
projects.summary: Designing systems that enable scalable, reliable, and intelligent financial operations for nonprofit organizations.

projects.title: Designing a Content System That Scales Beyond a Portfolio
projects.summary: Building a Git-based CMS architecture using static generation, structured content, and a clean separation between content and UI.

projects.title: Designing Data Migration Pipelines That Don’t Break at Scale
projects.summary: Building resilient pipelines to process large datasets with correctness, observability, and recoverability.
